queries.question: For every news portal, show me the categories they show
queries.sql: select online_news_portals.name , categories.category_name from Online_News_Portals_Categories join Categories on Online_News_Portals_Categories.category_id = Categories.id join Online_News_Portals on Online_News_Portals_Categories.online_news_portal_id = Online_News_Portals.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?category_name WHERE {
  ?online_news_portals_categories a :Online_News_Portals_Categories .
  ?categories a :Category .
  ?online_news_portals_categories p:hasCategories ?categories .
  ?online_news_portals a :Online_News_Portals .
  ?online_news_portals_categories p:hasOnline_News_Portals ?online_news_portals .
  ?online_news_portals p:name ?name .
  ?categories p:category_name ?category_name .
}

queries.question: Show me the categories that are common to all news portals
queries.sql: SELECT Categories.category_name  from Online_News_Portals_Categories join Categories on Online_News_Portals_Categories.category_id = Categories.id join Online_News_Portals on Online_News_Portals_Categories.online_news_portal_id = Online_News_Portals.id   GROUP BY Online_News_Portals_Categories.category_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Online_News_Portals_Categories.online_news_portal_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Online_News_Portals)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What categories do we have for every news portal?
